policy_note: CLI is a binary crate with most code under `commands/` doing CLI parsing, dispatch, or I/O against live models/servers — hard to unit-test cleanly. This policy is scoped to the `bench/` subtree (the recent refactor in `commands/primary/bench/`), where pure helpers (helpers.rs, row.rs) hit 100% and the I/O-heavy modules live on debt baselines that should ratchet upward as integration tests land. Per-file entries are debt baselines from cargo-llvm-cov on 2026-05-15 — they must only ratchet *upward*. New files under bench/ must hit the 90% default on first commit. Total floor reflects the whole-package number on the same date.
